summary: A faithful, well-structured implementation matching the design closely across all sections with correct EDS signature classes and asset references. Main deductions are for the long-RTF body font being too large/wrong weight/color, the header secondary-nav background being too dark, the footer Gilead logo left-aligned instead of centered, and minor card font-size scaling differences.

issues.expected: Body/list font-size 15px, key bold lines at font-weight 700, text color #000000
issues.actual: Some lines render at 18px font-size, font-weight 400, and color rgb(33,37,41) — computed-style failures flagged on 'Hepatitis B virus reactivation' and 'What is EPCLUSA?' lines
issues.fix: Force .ep-longrtf p/li to 15px, weight 700 on bold lead-ins, and color #000000 (override Bootstrap body defaults)

issues.expected: Secondary nav bar background tone matching design (#50758A muted blue)
issues.actual: Renders noticeably darker/grayer than the design strip
issues.fix: Verify the secondary-nav background color renders as #50758A, not a darker gray overlay

issues.expected: Gilead logo positioned at x≈275px (centered/indented within content column)
issues.actual: Logo at x=155px, left-aligned to the padding edge
issues.fix: Adjust footer logo column alignment to place the image near x≈275px per the design

issues.expected: Card titles sized so two-word headings wrap as in design (e.g. 'EPCLUSA can treat Hep C')
issues.actual: Card title font-size slightly larger causing different line wrapping vs design
issues.fix: Reduce .ep-card-title font-size to match design scale (~22px) for consistent wrapping

issues.actual: Flagged as missing-text (placeholder attribute not counted as text content)
issues.fix: Ensure 'ZIP Code' is rendered as visible/accessible text content, not only a placeholder

issues.expected: Arrow icon points up-right per arrow-up-thin asset
issues.actual: Arrow rotated to point downward via transform:rotate(90deg)
issues.fix: Use the asset orientation matching the design (up/right arrow), remove incorrect rotation

layoutFailures.fix: Add this text content exactly as written

layoutFailures.text: What is EPCLUSA? EPCLUSA is a prescripti
Hepatitis B virus reactivation: Before s
layoutFailures.fix: Set font-size to 15px (use the matching token/heading class)
